title: 查询事件服务资源
description: 查询服务器事件服务资源。

title: 修改事件服务资源
description: 修改事件服务资源，包括修改事件上报开关状态和修改事件主机标识源。

title: 对未恢复的事件重新上报
description: 对未恢复的事件重新上报。

title: 模拟精准告警
command: curl -k -u admin:password -X POST 'https://<bmc_ip>/redfish/v1/EventService/Actions/Oem/Huawei/' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{  "ServiceEnabled": false,  "CertVerificationEnabled": false,  "ServerAddress": "device_ip",  "ServerPort": 25,  "TLSEnabled": true,  "AnonymousLoginEnabled": false,  "SenderUserName": "huawei",  "SenderPassword": "Password",  "SenderAddress": "huawei@outlook.com",  "EmailSubject": "Server Alert",  "EmailSubjectContains": [],  "AlarmSeverity": "Normal",  "ReportType": "SEL",  "RecipientAddresses": [   {    "Enabled": false,    "EmailAddress": "smtptest@it.software.com",    "Description": "smtptest"   }  ] }'
request_body:
{
  "ServiceEnabled": false,
  "CertVerificationEnabled": false,
  "ServerAddress": "device_ip",
  "ServerPort": 25,
  "TLSEnabled": true,
  "AnonymousLoginEnabled": false,
  "SenderUserName": "huawei",
  "SenderPassword": "Password",
  "SenderAddress": "huawei@outlook.com",
  "EmailSubject": "Server Alert",
  "EmailSubjectContains": [],
  "AlarmSeverity": "Normal",
  "ReportType": "SEL",
  "RecipientAddresses": [
    {
      "Enabled": false,
      "EmailAddress": "smtptest@it.software.com",
      "Description": "smtptest"
    }
  ]
}

title: 修改事件订阅资源

{
  "ServiceEnabled": false,
  "CertVerificationEnabled": false,
  "ServerAddress": "device_ip",

  "AnonymousLoginEnabled": false,
